zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Seymour於1370年7月3日出生在英國薩默塞特哈契時，他的父親William Seymour21歲，母親Margaret de Brockbury19歲。他於大約1400年與Maud Esturnie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年7月17日在英國維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾伊斯頓 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Seymour于1370年7月3日出生在英国薩默塞特哈契时，他的父亲William Seymour21岁，母亲Margaret de Brockbury19岁。他于大约1400年与Maud Esturnie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年7月17日在英国維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾伊斯頓 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Seymour was born on 3 July 1370, in Hatch, Somerset, England, his father, William Seymour, was 21 and his mother, Margaret de Brockbury, was 19. He married Maud Esturnie about 1400. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 17 July 1420, in Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Easton Town, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Seymour est né le 3 juillet 1370, à Hatch, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Seymour, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Brockbury, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Maud Esturnie environ 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1420, à Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Easton Town, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Seymour am 3. Juli 1370 in Hatch, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Seymour 21 und seine Mutter Margaret de Brockbury 19. Er hat um 1400 Maud Esturnie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1420 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Easton Town, Wiltshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Seymourが1370年7月3日にイギリスソメルセトハトチで生まれた時，父William Seymourは21歳，母Margaret de Brockburyは19歳であった。約1400年にMaud Esturnieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年7月17日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウオルフ ハルで50歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアエアストン トウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Seymour(이)가 1370년 7월 3일 영국 서머세트 해트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Seymour(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Brockbury(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 Maud Esturnie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 7월 17일 영국 윌츠히르 울프 홀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 이스트 타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Seymour nasceu em 3 de julho de 1370, em Hatch, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Seymour, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Brockbury, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Esturnie aproximadamente 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1420, em Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Easton Town, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Seymour родился 3 июля 1370 г. в местности хач, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William Seymour было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Brockbury, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Esturnie около 1400 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1420 г. в местности волф холл, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности эастон тоун, уилцхир, Англия.
